svg.title: AWS production cloud architecture diagram
svg.desc: Full AWS architecture showing internet traffic flowing through Route 53, ALB, ECS Fargate in private subnets, with ECR, CloudWatch, GitHub Actions CI/CD, and Terraform managing the infrastructure.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the internet layer in cloud architecture?')
sendPrompt('What does Route 53 do in this architecture?')
sendPrompt('What does the Application Load Balancer do?')
sendPrompt('What does the NAT Gateway do?')

svg.text: Private subnets (AZ-1a · AZ-1b) — no public IP

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What runs inside an ECS Fargate task?')
sendPrompt('What runs inside an ECS Fargate task?')
sendPrompt('How does auto scaling add more ECS tasks?')
sendPrompt('What is Amazon ECR used for?')
sendPrompt('What does CloudWatch monitor in this setup?')
sendPrompt('What is SSM Parameter Store used for?')
sendPrompt('What does Terraform manage in this architecture?')
sendPrompt('How does the GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline work?')

svg.text: Tap any component to learn more
